1f1ea6ed6704aa41.author:
Anand NP
1 photo
1f1ea6ed6704aa41.text:
purchased a Voltas 1.5-ton AC from the Sathya showroom in Kulasekharam on 18-04-2026. However, there has still been no response from the showroom.

When I visited the showroom, the manager said that the AC would be installed today, but it has not been installed yet. When I try to call them, they do not pick up my calls.

I feel very bad about buying the AC from Sathya showroom. Their service is very poor, and I am extremely disappointed. I purchased this AC more than 4 days ago, and still there has been no installation. This is very bad service.
